Container.Name: valhalla
Container.Overview: Self-hosted Valhalla routing + trace_attributes service for gpxplore, serving a pre-built us-west tile set from appdata. Serve-only: no auto-build. Tiles built by build-tiles.sh. Front with Cloudflare Tunnel for public/CORS/rate-limit exposure.

Config.Name: Tiles + config (/data)
Config.Description: The ACTIVE build: /mnt/user/appdata/valhalla/current is a symlink build-tiles.sh flips to the newest builds/us-west-YYMMDD/ (valhalla.json, tiles/, admins.sqlite, timezones.sqlite, surface_provenance.sqlite, tile_manifest.json). Restart this container after a build or rollback.sh so it re-resolves the symlink. (#14)

Config.Name: API port
Config.Description: Valhalla HTTP API (POST /route, /trace_attributes; GET /status). Point cloudflared / the wrapper Worker origin here.
